sectionSubtitle: Our method — from first conversation to lasting capability.

steps.title: Discover
steps.body: We understand your environment — infrastructure, team, risks, goals. No two companies are the same, and neither are our recommendations.

steps.title: Design
steps.body: We create a detailed blueprint tailored to your needs — architecture, templates, implementation guides, and review checkpoints. Everything is documented. Everything is yours.

steps.title: Guide
steps.body: Your team implements with our oversight. Blueprint-only: defined checkpoints. Build Partnership: weekly syncs, async access, pair sessions, milestone reviews, and training woven into delivery.

steps.title: Transfer
steps.body: We train your team to maintain and extend what we've built together. By the end, you don't need us — but you'll want us for the next challenge.

steps.title: Advise
steps.body: For ongoing support, our Beacon advisory program provides monthly reviews, strategic guidance, and incident availability. Always available. Never required.

sharedResponsibility.title: Shared Responsibility Model
sharedResponsibility.body: We're accountable for the quality of our guidance, blueprints, and specifications. You're accountable for implementing them. We flag when implementation diverges from our recommendations. You own the outcome — because that's the only way it stays strong after we leave.
